heading: “Mineral leasing laws” defined
label: 505 “Mineral leasing laws” defined
text: As used in this chapter “mineral leasing laws” shall mean the Act of (); the Act of () [ et seq.]; the Act of () [ et seq.]; the Act of () [ et seq.] and all Acts heretofore or hereafter enacted which are amendatory of or supplementary to any of the foregoing Acts.October 20, 1914February 25, 1920April 17, 1926February 7, 192738 Stat. 74141 Stat. 43730 U.S.C. 18144 Stat. 30130 U.S.C. 27144 Stat. 105730 U.S.C. 281
